creator: peter.schuller@infidyne.com
text:
- Update to 8.2.7
- Note that 8.2.7 includes a VIM syntax highlighting mode. This patch results
  in a port which does NOT install this, because right now I don't have time
  to investigate how to properly handle VIM data. I am also too rusty on VIM
  to properly test it. However, this is something that did not exit before
  at all, so it is not a regression relative to the version currently in
  ports.

Port maintainer (anholt@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
